title: A Formal Model of How Artificial Intelligence Erodes Human Agency
summary_en: In this report, the authors draw on social choice theory to develop a formal model of how AI erodes collective human agency; they also model decisionmaking to identify the point beyond which this erosion could become irreversible.
title_cn: 人工智能侵蚀人类能动性的正式模型

title: Expanding School Counseling: The Impacts of California Funding Changes
summary_en: We use panel-based estimators to show that California’s Supplemental School Counseling Program increased the number of counselors on staff and improved counselor to student ratios, but reduced average counselor experience.
title_cn: 扩大学心理咨询服务覆盖面：加利福尼亚州经费调整的影响
